== Notes for [[Item:Q84201|Q84201]] ==

Page 240 https://books.google.no/books?id=BtWZrdKZpi8C&pg=PA240&lpg=PA240&dq=Gaius+Ummidius+Quadratus+Sallustius&source=bl&ots=j0WhpYCx9U&sig=cGRxPB_26tYxjK6qtzghNFgNPLI&hl=no&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwjD5PTBgfvXAhXDPZoKHcERCJU4ChDoAQhOMAs#v=onepage&q=Gaius%20Ummidius%20Quadratus%20Sallustius&f=false

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F29409121941EFBBE49822EF79916C0EFA
geni:6000000003828382782

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
